title: RAG Customer Testimonial
scenario: Create a customer testimonial for the Rugged Adventure Gear (RAG) waterproof backpack. The testimonial should include the customer's name, a brief description of their experience with the product, and a quote summarizing their satisfaction with the product. The output should be in a text format and include at least 50 words.
constraints: Must include a quote from the customer

evaluationCriteria.description: The testimonial is well-written and engaging.
The testimonial meets the word count and quote requirements.
The testimonial sounds realistic and genuine.
